steps.t: The ramshackle dwelling sits in the hills of eastern Rath Dúath. You should speak to the occupants of the dwelling.
The ramshackle dwelling sits in the hills of northern Rath Dúath. You should speak to the occupants of the broken-down house.
The child's lost toy must be somewhere nearby. You should search for the child's toy.
The ramshackle dwelling sits in the hills of northern Rath Dúath. You should return to the broken-down dwelling to further your investigations.
